/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/src/framework.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/src/shader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/src/terrain.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/voxel-engine.dir/src/camera.cpp.o" -o voxel-engine  libglad.a /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so -ldl
